title: Suki Gifts International Pop Up Card Happy Birthday 18, Multi-Colour
features: Colourful, memorable & Unique; Mailable 3D pop up card; Easy step by step instructions
Card comes with envelope & packaging wallet
description: From the manufacturer Welcome to the unique world of 3D pop-up cards Pop Up Cards for Special Occasions The cards come in a variety of different designs and suitable for any occasion: Birthday cards, birth, thanksgiving, Christmas, Valentine's greeting and much more. Pop up cards as balloon weight Foil balloons filled with balloon gas make any festival even more beautiful. Suki's pop up cards are great as a balloon weight. And of course, each balloon greeting will be even more unforgettable with a personal message for which there is space on the pop-up card. Pop Up Cards for Personalized Bouquets Add a personal touch to bouquets for birthdays as a thank you or other occasions with a Suki pop-up card. A miracle of paper art The 3D pop up cards from Suki Gifts are a miracle of paper art. Each card has over 50 folds and cuts and is individually folded and carefully assembled into a unique paper sculpture. An elastic band holds the card together and releases the "pop". The card has a tag for a personal greeting and also a small text box on the back. The card has the dimensions of approx. 17 x 12 cm, when opened, the card unfolds to a size of 17 x 24 cm.
